name: hoc/settings-layout
description: A settings-page layout HOC that pairs a left-hand navigation list with a scrollable content area, automatically adapting to a mobile drawer on narrow viewports. Provides SettingsLayout, SettingsLayoutNav, SettingsLayoutNavItem, SettingsLayoutContent, and SettingsLayoutHeader primitives with active-section highlighting, smooth scrolling, and i18n labels. Composed of Card, Drawer, Button, and Sidebar primitives with full ConfigProvider locale support.
useCases: User account settings with sidebar links (Profile, Security, Notifications, Billing) and content panes
Admin system-configuration pages grouping General, API Keys, Integrations, and Team settings
Multi-step preference wizards where each section is a discrete settings category with validation
SaaS tenant-customization portals allowing white-label, branding, and feature-flag configuration
usage: import { SettingsLayout, SettingsLayoutNav, SettingsLayoutNavItem, SettingsLayoutContent, SettingsLayoutHeader } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/settings-layout"
